{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140410C135FE4F4FE4362CAA76"}"},"total":470},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598818608816030526","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我其实很抗拒看带系统带金手指的刑侦文的，一般都跳过，在番茄一直都是看刑侦文，这篇总在关联推荐里。昨天点进来看了下简介和评价，抱着好看就看，不好看不加入书架浪费点时间罢了的心态一口气看了三十章，金手指一点都不出戏，系统完全不夸张，算是很合理的爽文。文笔也可以，主角性格也好，很正直的法医。不是那种看到个女的就走不动道的，目前出现的男配女配刻画都很好，不是刻板印象的。案情剧情都精彩，可以看可以看。","text_exts":[{"e":72,"s":69,"text":"不好看","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8D%E5%A5%BD%E7%9C%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774073051362CAA76%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227598818608816030526%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227589493688540089368%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8D%E5%A5%BD%E7%9C%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769241987,"group_id":"7589493688540089368","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"支持番茄把绿江干倒闭","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NySoB1T1shczoHqJl9v82t4=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/60470a4baaf247cd80d4974377b1cfa8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621043&x-signature=IxBFSV%2FQBfWBf0o%2FAtmZ0%2B%2BGzTo%3D","user_id":"910011087983287","user_name":"绿江何时倒闭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"910011087983287","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589493688540089368","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出。）
刚毕业加入刑警队的法医沈明发现，他的眼睛总能看到一些别人难以注意到的细节。
在案发现场中的重要线索，在沈明的眼中总是闪着奇怪的红色边框。
那么问题来了，有框的情况下你打不打？
我叫沈明，一个与死者同行的开挂法医。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ad64fe36708b9adc3cd73dbb62cb4666","author":"我不是曹魏","author_id":"","book_id":"7589493688540089368","book_name":"凶手留下的痕迹，我全能看得到","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"27.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7589493826096480792","read_count":"273359","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"566713"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"260","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,推理,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/aeed941bfcc6bb4bb106144b3af7ebc5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257051&x-signature=JTZXRKx58VWYVkenWmWyEZawlvk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3945468816010798","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140410C135FE4F4FE4362CAA76"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":260,"forwarded_count":3,"listen_duration":5565,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5603,"reply_count":69,"show_pv":119812},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617414205830251288","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很真实，挂很小，也合理，能接受。人物设定都很全面，主角本身没有什么复仇啥的。家庭幸福，父母双全。亲戚也都是正常人，没有讨厌的。工作上，也都是为了破案，没有什么勾心斗角。案子流程也很快，但是细节满满，挂就像放大镜，让主角发现这块有问题，具体问题主角自己找，整体是本好书，推荐！案子之间只有一点家庭温馨，使得人物更饱满。就是居然在连载，我恨！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773569521,"group_id":"7589493688540089368","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4GfbhkU1NoSg9LWlj6tbLA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"6847974794","user_name":"手里有鸡蛋黄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6847974794","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589493688540089368","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出。）

4350","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角有个金手指，金手指很厉害，但是写的很棒，就是那种忽略金手指，也能读的很通的感觉，不是装ac文，每个人都有自己的位置，自己的光芒，没有乱七八糟的感情线，就是案子，就是一个眼明心细的百分之百破案的刑警日常，虽然没有完结，但是都是一个案子一个案子，简短精彩，不拖拉，追更也很好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772973748,"group_id":"7589493688540089368","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+sAsT6W7NRmo6i83ap9LoHWJ8MxcOuE4t/MjHdKYsVg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4da4119755fd4347a70f036f66b284ce~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616418&x-signature=vDR80S9EMIHwJ05FRBMTLdVRdWs%3D","user_id":"2885541954061389","user_name":"来自霍格沃茨的点点"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2885541954061389","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1772964112,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589493688540089368","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出。）
